piece.title: Nocturne in E minor, Op. 72 No. 1
piece.focus: The interpretation I keep coming back to

piece.title: Nocturne in D flat major, Op. 27 No. 2
piece.focus: Phrasing and the long right hand line

piece.title: Clair de Lune, from Suite Bergamasque

practiceRoutine.block: Warm-up: scales, arpeggios, slow technical drills
Repertoire, hands separate on hard passages

playlist.description: Solo piano references for the current repertoire

playlist.description: Heartland rock for working in the yard and tending the pit

playlist.description: Early jazz for slow Sunday mornings

playlist.description: Symphonic listening, tied to the season subscription

upcomingConcert.title: An Evening of Chopin and Debussy
